title: PUT cannot set year=0 or clear optional string fields
evidence: app.go:212-219 treats req.Year==0 and empty strings as 'keep existing', so a client can never explicitly set year to 0 or clear isbn via PUT
suggestion: Use pointer fields (*int/*string) in UpdateBookRequest to distinguish omitted from zero-value

title: Create/Update responses rebuild JSON manually instead of returning the Book struct
evidence: app.go:105-111 and app.go:230-236 assemble gin.H maps rather than a Book; risks response/DB drift and is why idiomatic scored 0.48
suggestion: Return a populated Book struct so the response mirrors persisted state

title: No uniqueness constraint on isbn
evidence: app.go:48-55 books table has no UNIQUE index on isbn; duplicate ISBNs are accepted
suggestion: Add a UNIQUE constraint if ISBNs are meant to be unique (beyond spec)

title: Error/500 branches uncovered (test_coverage=0.586)
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.586; 13 tests pass with 0 skips but DB-error 500 paths (e.g. app.go:94-97,126-128) are unexercised
suggestion: Coverage is acceptable for CRUD happy+404+400 paths; optionally inject DB failures to cover 500s
